name: COVID-19 Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for COVID-19 vaccines including initial series and booster doses from Pfizer-BioNTech, Moderna, Johnson & Johnson/Janssen, and Novavax. Used in COVID-19 vaccination status measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, PF, 100 mcg/0.5mL or 50 mcg/0.25mL dose (Moderna)
COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, PF, 30 mcg/0.3 mL dose (Pfizer-BioNTech)
COVID-19 vaccine, vector-nr, rS-ChAdOx1, PF, 0.5 mL (AstraZeneca)
COVID-19, subunit, rS-nanoparticle+Matrix-M1 Adjuvant, PF, 0.5 mL (Novavax)
COVID-19 vaccine, vector-nr, rS-Ad26, PF, 0.5 mL (Janssen/J&J)
COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, PF, 30 mcg/0.3 mL dose, tris-sucrose (Pfizer 12+)
COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, PF, 10 mcg/0.2 mL dose, tris-sucrose (Pfizer 5-11)
COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, PF, 3 mcg/0.2 mL dose, tris-sucrose (Pfizer 6mo-4yr)
COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, bivalent, PF, 50 mcg/0.5 mL or 25 mcg/0.25 mL dose (Moderna bivalent)
COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, bivalent, PF, 30 mcg/0.3 mL dose (Pfizer bivalent 12+)
COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, bivalent, PF, 10 mcg/0.2 mL dose (Pfizer bivalent 5-11)
COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, bivalent, PF, 3 mcg/0.2 mL dose (Pfizer bivalent 6mo-4yr)
COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, bivalent, PF (2023-2024 formulation, Pfizer)
COVID-19, mRNA, LNP-S, bivalent, PF (2023-2024 formulation, Moderna)
COVID-19, subunit, rS-nanoparticle+Matrix-M1 Adjuvant, PF (2023-2024 formulation, Novavax)
SARS-CoV-2 vaccine, mRNA-LNP, PF, 30 mcg/0.3 mL, diluent reconstituted (Pfizer)
SARS-CoV-2 vaccine, mRNA-LNP, S, PF, 100 mcg/0.5 mL (Moderna)
SARS-CoV-2 vaccine, Ad26 vector, S, PF, 0.5 mL (Janssen)
